items.title: UnitedHealth Faces Slim MA Rate Proposal And Higher 2025 Execution Test
items.description: CMS has proposed a minimal Medicare Advantage reimbursement rate increase for 2027 that UnitedHealth Group says may not align with current cost and utilization trends. As the largest Medicare Advantage insurer, UnitedHealth Group could face pressure to reassess benefits, products, and geographic coverage if final rates stay close to the proposal. The company is restructuring its operations, including divestitures and workforce reductions, and has framed 2025 as a key year for reassessment of...

items.title: AM Best Assigns Credit Ratings to Care Improvement Plus South Central Insurance Company
items.description: OLDWICK, N.J., February 03, 2026--AM Best has assigned a Financial Strength Rating of A (Excellent) and a Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "a+" (Excellent) to Care Improvement Plus South Central Insurance Company (CIPSCIC) (Omaha, NE), a health insurance subsidiary of UnitedHealth Group Incorporated. The outlook assigned to these Credit Ratings (ratings) is stable.

items.title: UnitedHealth Stock Could Reach New Heights by 2030: Here’s the Outlook
items.description: Is the outlook for UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH) stock healthy or ill? That’s the crucial question for concerned investors as the general sentiment remains low for this embattled healthcare provider. This might sound counterintuitive at first, but the fall-off in UNH stock could provide a multi-year investment opportunity. There’s no denying that the aging baby boomer population ... items.title: Can Centene's Q4 Earnings Escape Membership & Cost Headwinds?
items.description: CNC heads into Q4 earnings with revenue growth expected, but declining membership and higher medical costs cloud the outlook.
